desc: time.sleep() runs on the GUI thread in both actions, freezing painting, input handling, and timer processing.
refresh_status() replaces the label stylesheet with color-only rules, permanently discarding the initial 14px font size.
The bare except catches BaseException subclasses such as KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit instead of only conversion errors.
Constructing QApplication at module import time causes GUI initialization side effects and can conflict with hosts or tests that already own a QApplication.
The output log uses an editable QTextEdit, allowing displayed add/delete history to be accidentally or deliberately altered.
Name validation rejects only the empty string, so whitespace-only names are accepted as users.
